title: rumex acetosella var. graminifolius
intro: Rumex acetosella var. graminifolius, commonly known as sheep's sorrel, is a perennial herb belonging to the buckwheat family (Polygonaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of sheep's sorrel include its potential to reduce inflammation, boost the immune system, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
